## 0.1.0 (2026-07-09)

- Initial Binwak strategy skill for `binwak/coordinator`, ported from `official/software-development-lifecycle` 0.3.3.
- Worker FQNs retargeted to `binwak/{engineer,reviewer,designer}` and coord to `binwak/coordinator`; repo `kyn0v/Binwak`.
- Case bank, brief guidance, context sources, stop condition, and failure-mode coverage unchanged from the official strategy.
